# @platform/api-runtime

HTTP API server runtime: request routing, middleware pipeline, auth enforcement, and response envelope.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/api-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: api-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: api-server
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own the HTTP server lifecycle and request routing foundation
- Provide middleware pipeline for auth, logging, tracing, and rate-limiting
- Enforce authentication and authorization at the API boundary
- Emit structured audit events and observability signals per request

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define domain logic or business rules
- Does not own GraphQL schema or resolver implementation
- Does not manage persistent storage directly

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by application packages to construct and start the HTTP server
- Feature packages compose domain logic behind API handlers registered here

platform

## Operational notes

- All inbound requests pass through the auth middleware before reaching handlers
- Structured request logs are emitted via observability package
